name: Noob Exterminators
description:
Noob Exterminators is a game that i found to be really cool, so i made a bot out of it!

This is my FIRST!!! bot! I FULLY APPRECIATE ANY COMMENTS AND SUGGESTIONS!! IT HASNT BEEN TESTED YET!!!

I made this as a way to try to get experience in bot making as i want to make things that people can enjoy and also to be able to make things that i myself want to use and enjoy. And i tought “Why not start with a game you recently found and liked?” So here i am, making a bot of a lethal-company-esque game, you should honestly try it out! Its fun and requires proper strategizing, and gets really difficult later on. (World record being day 25, achieved in around two hours of gameplay i think?)

I attempted to make it accurate to the game in someway?? Ill try adding in all the enemies, this is definitely gonna be meant to be chatted with proxy, due to the Janitor LLM’s glitchy behavior.

CHECK OUT @SAFA !!! THEY HAVE RECENTLY BEEN UPDATING MY VERSION OF THIS BOT AND MADE IT THEIR OWN! BETTER ONE THAN MINE PROBABLY!

BOT IS MAJORLY OUTDATED!!! I HAVENT UPDATED IT IN A WHILE, AND I STOPPED PLAYING THE GAME, SO IM UNSURE HOW TO UPDATE IT.
creator: Ackackackacka
